game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: An endless running game where players control a character running on three parallel train tracks, swiping left or right to change lanes, up to jump over obstacles, and down to slide under barriers. The game continuously scrolls forward at increasing speeds, spawning trains, barriers, and collectible coins at predetermined intervals that become more frequent and challenging over time.
game_info.description: Race through an endless subway on three parallel train tracks! Dodge oncoming trains, jump over barriers, slide under obstacles, and collect coins to boost your score. The game gets faster and more challenging the longer you survive. How far can you run?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left / A: Move to left lane
Arrow Right / D: Move to right lane
Arrow Up / W: Jump over obstacles
Arrow Down / S: Slide under barriers
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and lane switching functionality. Tests that the player can move between all three lanes smoothly and respond to inputs correctly. Validates collision detection with simple obstacles.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player systematically between lanes (left to center to right and back). Jump and slide periodically to test vertical movement. Intentionally collide with obstacles to verify game over detection works properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should smoothly transition between lanes. Jump and slide animations should work correctly. Collision with obstacles should trigger game over. The test is successful when all movement mechanics work without errors and collisions are properly detected.

TEST_2.test_description: Endurance and progression test. Validates that the game can run for an extended period, spawn increasingly difficult obstacles, and maintain stable performance as speed increases. Tests coin collection and scoring.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Play for 60 seconds while avoiding all obstacles perfectly. Collect coins when safe to do so. Allow speed to increase naturally. Monitor frame rate and check for any visual glitches or performance degradation.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Game should run smoothly for at least 60 seconds. Speed should progressively increase. Obstacles should spawn more frequently. Score should increase with distance and coins. Test succeeds if no crashes occur and performance remains stable.
